# Malatamba Vidyaniketan — Full Reference

> Premier co-educational English medium school established 2002, located at PM Palem, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. Affiliated to APSCERT and recognized by the Government of Andhra Pradesh.

## About the School

Malatamba Vidyaniketan was founded in 2002 by Chairman Mr. Suneel Mahanty (M.Sc., M.Phil., MBA (FISM)) with the vision to create a school where every child feels seen, valued, and inspired to reach their fullest potential. Over 20 years, the school has grown to serve 1000+ students with 50+ faculty members, offering education from Nursery to Class X under the APSCERT board, recognized by the AP Government.

- Founded: 2002
- Address: Sadguru Towers, Malatamba Road, PM Palem, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530041
- Affiliation: APSCERT, AP Government Recognized
- Classes offered: Nursery to Class X
- Chairman: Mr. Suneel Mahanty

## Facilities

### Smart Classrooms
20+ classrooms equipped with interactive smart boards, HD projectors, and digital learning tools. Teachers blend traditional pedagogy with modern technology to make every lesson engaging and effective. All classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled.

### Science & Computer Labs
Fully-equipped Physics, Chemistry, and Biology laboratories give students hands-on experience. Two dedicated computer labs house 40 computers total (40 PCs across the labs) with high-speed internet, providing digital literacy from early grades.

### Library
A well-stocked library houses over 3,000 books, reference materials, newspapers, and magazines. A dedicated reading room cultivates a love for books and research, supporting students across all grades.

### Sports & Athletics
Physical fitness is an integral part of education at Malatamba. Facilities include:
- Cricket Ground
- Football Field
- Athletics Track
- Volleyball
- Throwball
- Indoor Games
- Outdoor Games

Qualified sports coaches ensure every child develops team spirit and physical health.

### Campus & Culture
Beyond classrooms and labs, the campus includes:
- Auditorium Stage
- Art Room
- Music Room
- Landscaped Grounds
- Yoga Room
- Library Room
- Conference Room
- Digital Classroom

### Safe Transport
The school operates a fleet of school buses covering all major routes across Visakhapatnam, with trained drivers and male and female attendants on every bus, plus strict safety protocols — giving parents complete peace of mind every day.

## Admissions Process

1. **Submit Enquiry** — Fill the 3-step enquiry form (under 2 minutes).
2. **WhatsApp Response** — The admissions team contacts you within a few hours.
3. **School Visit** — Tour the campus and meet the team.
4. **Confirm Admission** — Complete paperwork and fee payment.

Admissions are open Nursery to Class X, following the APSCERT board curriculum, AP Government recognized.

- Phone: 8985674670
- Email: principalmalatambaschools@gmail.com
- Address: Sadguru Towers, Malatamba Road, PM Palem, Visakhapatnam 530041
- Website: https://www.malatambavidyaniketan.ac.in

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Which board is Malatamba Vidyaniketan affiliated to?**
A: APSCERT, recognized by Government of Andhra Pradesh.

**Q: What classes does Malatamba Vidyaniketan offer?**
A: Nursery to Class X.

**Q: Where is Malatamba Vidyaniketan located?**
A: Sadguru Towers, Malatamba Road, PM Palem, Visakhapatnam 530041.

**Q: Does the school provide transport?**
A: Yes, safe school buses with trained male and female attendants covering all major routes in Visakhapatnam.

**Q: When was Malatamba Vidyaniketan established?**
A: 2002.

**Q: How can I contact Malatamba Vidyaniketan?**
A: Call 8985674670 or email principalmalatambaschools@gmail.com.
